data.title: Scalable Microservices
data.description: WhatsApp's architecture is built using microservices that ensure scalability and performance.
data.technical_spec: Microservices architecture utilizes containerization with tools like Docker and Kubernetes.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Messages are secured with end-to-end encryption, protecting data from unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes the Signal Protocol for encryption, ensuring messages are only read by the sender and recipient.

data.title: Data Replication
data.description: WhatsApp uses data replication techniques for failover and high availability.
data.technical_spec: Replication is achieved with database clusters distributed across multiple data centers.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: To handle millions of simultaneous connections, WhatsApp employs robust load balancing techniques.
data.technical_spec: Network load balancers spread traffic evenly across distributed servers.

data.title: Real-Time Communication
data.description: The architecture is optimized for real-time messaging and calls.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes protocols like WebRTC and XMPP for low-latency communication.
